chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P.No.D- 2368 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For orders on MA 8774/2017. 3. For Katcha Peshi. 16.01.2018. None present for the petitioners. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Additional A.G. alongwith PI Syed Manzoor Ali on behalf of SSP Hyderabad, SIP Abdul Razak SHP PS Phuleli, ASI Lachamandas PS Airport, ASI Muhammad Waris PS Khan and ASI Abdul Haleem PS Site Hyderabad. = Learned A.A.G. files the comments on behalf of respondents No.3 to 10, which are taken on record. This is second call. Neither the petitioners nor their advocate is present. No intimation has been received. It is now 11-20 a.m. Notices of this petition were issued to the respondents subject to the maintainability of this petition. As observed above, none present on behalf of the petitioners to address and satisfy the court with regard to the maintainability of this petition. It appears that perhaps the petitioners have lost interest in this petition which is accordingly dismissed in non-prosecution alongwith pending application. JUDGE JUDGE Tufail
